title: Under His wings I am safely abiding
firstLine: Under His wings I am safely abiding;
publicDomainBasis: William Orcutt Cushing (1823–1902), Ira David Sankey (1840–1908). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
Chorus
sections.text:
Under His wings—what a refuge in sorrow!
How the heart yearningly turns to His rest!
Often when earth has no balm for my healing,
There I find comfort, and there I am blest.

sections.label: Chorus
